name: Trainee Software Engineer
description: Supports the development, testing and maintenance of software applications while building core engineering skills.

name: Lead Software Engineer
description: Provides technical leadership across a team and guides the delivery of software solutions.

name: Test Engineer
description: Creates and runs tests to ensure software meets quality, performance and reliability standards.

name: Data Engineer
description: Builds and maintains data pipelines, databases and data solutions to support business needs.

name: Delivery Manager
description: Coordinates teams, timelines and delivery plans to help projects meet their goals.

name: Product Consultant
description: Works with stakeholders to understand requirements and help shape digital products.
